reviews.review_description:
Fun game. I realized that you don't have to actually run, but just have the headset moving is good for the character to run.

But running is way funnier

This is the first fitness game I see that is actually a game, like any big title game, with campaign and everything, not like those rythm games where you just hit some boxes and there is only a static skybox! Plus it is maybe the only game where you can use dumbells, that's why you don't have a gun to shoot enemies but bodyguards, to let your hands free if you want to use weights to %increase the intensity of the workout!

Pretty fun game.  I LOVE THE CONCEPT. There's a lot they could do with this, and more games need to incorporate real running into them so people can use their legs and burn more calories in VR. 
I hope they keep working on this game because it could be so fun to run around and complete missions. It just needs more fleshing out. If they added the ability to shoot enemies, it would be a super fun workout!


I don't really like the gliding after you stop running. There should be a way to limit that.
There's a lot of loading screens for just very short missions in one room. Doing the campaign, I got so far and then got looped back into the tutorial missions, so that was frustrating. 

I'm not sure this game is worth $10 as it is. Maybe $5. Feels like a demo.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the review! Sorry, the version you played was a beta and there was an error in the developer dashboard and we couldn't update it and META took very long to fix it, but now we have the final version live! Please update it and play it again!

reviews.review_description: Very good for fitness! If you lack motivation, just jump into this game and no matter how tired you are, it will get you going! It will make your legs and powerful by running and jumping so much and get you lose fat! The game and music are amazing and very motivational!
I've never seen the point in exercising and running (except to catch a bus or train). But this way it makes VeRy much sense to me.

reviews.review_title: It’s a fitness GAME, not a fitness APP!
reviews.review_description:
In Ultra Real Runner, unlike other fitness APPS, you’re playing a GAME. Unlike other games, you’re exercising. While running in place, you forget that you’re actually exercising because you’re immersed and distracted by the mission. Who wants to make exercising fun again? 🙋🏼‍♀️ Although there are a lot of annoying loading screens, I use them as a quick cool down, breather, or to drink water. Before you know it, you’re an hour into jogging in place and covered in sweat. I have bad knees so I do soft bunny hops over obstacles. There is a way to cheat the system but there is no point in doing that. It’d be boring and you’ll probably get rug burn on your face.  

Sure, some of the game needs a little polishing but it doesn’t detract from having fun. This unique game is the only game on the Quest that allows you to run and jump in real life while playing a game. There are a lot of training levels that build up in intensity and prepare you for the mission. So put down your bonbons and put on your headset. Put down your controllers and pick up some dumbbells. Give it a run for your money. It’s under $10 and worth it.

reviews.review_title: Great fun for a good workout
reviews.review_description: I have watched this game from its earlier demo. It has come a long way. This dev is known for making great games for very modest prices. This game is a great workout with multiple options for movement to adjust to your fitness level. The best workouts are the ones disguised as fun and this nails it.

This game is excellent for fitness, involves a lot of jogging, and jumping over obstacles. The bonus of this over other apps is how it is both fun, and immersive - it has life sized characters, storyline, etc. It makes it more fun, and less tedious exercise, but still a very active, and enjoyable workout! Definitely recommend a quality headstrap for longer sessions!

Don’t think I’ve played any game like it! The immersion is crazy! Actually having to physically jump to jump in the game and really move to navigate you way to the finish line! 

Great for fitness you can burn so many calories using this app 

Very clever great job

So it’s like a fitness game that is actually fun there are three different types of ways to move you can move with you feet move automatically or you can just use the joy stick it is so fun cause your distracted by the mission and stuff and every new level they add more and more stuff that can either help you or can slow you down it is so cooool

Really enjoying the concept and its a good way to get some jogging in without thinking about the exercise because I’m focused on different tasks and having a lot of fun in the process. I like the music and get into it feeling motivated. I also enjoy chasing after the automated instructors and try to beat them to the finish line with fast steps at the end.  I think any game like this where you’ve got body movement and fun intertwined is worth it to give it a shot!
There's nothing like it, it gives you a boost of adrenaline, a sensation of being in the game and running, and you would feel like you run a marathon and a mountain afterwards!
